summary: Focus on merging the streaming export PR, then refresh README env docs before the next release.

priorities.title: Review PR #58 streaming export
priorities.reason: Largest feature in flight; blocks release notes and downstream docs.

priorities.title: Update README environment variables
priorities.reason: Issue #42 reports missing env var docs; quick win before release.

priorities.title: Fix CONTRIBUTING typo
priorities.reason: Issue #37 is a single-line doc fix MaintainerOS can automate.

repositoryHealth.explanation: Active PR queue and responsive issue triage; documentation drift is the main gap.

release.reason: README env documentation should land before tagging v2.1.

suggestions: Add an Environment Variables section listing API_KEY and DATABASE_URL with brief descriptions.
Add an Unreleased section noting the streaming export feature from PR #58.

contributorOpportunities.reason: Clear documentation scope; good first issue for new contributors.

autoFixCandidates.reason: Single typo in CONTRIBUTING.md install command; one-line replace.

recommendations: Merge or close stale PRs older than two weeks.
Run a documentation pass before the next minor release.
